Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Contractual Arbitration And To Stay Pending Litigation;
Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MCDOWELL PROPERTIES, BAY VIEW ASSET SERVICES, FIRST STREET COMMERCIAL MORTGAGE FUND LLC, STEVEN RADCLIFFE, CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY, INC., CMR MORTGAGE FUND III, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY PENDING LITIGATION. Appearances: John Cuerva (342.9116) for plaintiffs and responding parties; Daniel Solitro of Locke Lord Bissell & Lidell (213.687.6747) appearing telephonically for defendants and moving parties. Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: Granted. The court does not find that there is a waiver. Parties to arbitrate and this case is stayed. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Contractual Arbitration And To Stay Pending Litigation;
Off Calendar Dec-09-2010 Continued To Dec-23-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
